description: investment-review was added but not enabled by the highest-priority repository routing contract
notes: AGENTS.md now enables an isolated repo-local investment-review route without changing canonical workflow types

description: Machine-generated mapping could be used for formal import without a completed human review lock
notes: Generated mapping is dry-run only and formal import now rejects it

description: Source schema and reviewed mapping provenance were not cryptographically bound to the approved inputs
notes: Reviewed mapping binds reviewer and time plus schema manifest and generated mapping paths and SHA-256 values

description: Reviewed mapping content could change after approval without invalidating formal import
notes: mapping_content_sha256 covers the complete reviewed document except its self-referential field and is rechecked at import

description: Account market cash and source config changes were not all included in drift detection
notes: All persisted canonical fields and complete config fingerprints are compared and source_config_versions retains three observed versions

description: Dividend and cash fee amounts could be lost because gross amount alone represented monetary value
notes: cash_amount is an independent canonical field and source sums reconcile for both non-trade event types

description: Decision notes could silently backdate known_at when the user did not provide a knowledge timestamp
notes: note-add requires explicit known_at and model validation rejects invalid timestamps and non-finite values

description: A wrong review database path could create review schema or WAL files inside a non-review SQLite database
notes: schema v2 application_id lock rejects non-review nonempty databases before initialization writes

description: Event-to-run lineage relied on source and timestamp-window inference instead of an explicit durable relation
notes: ingest_run_events contains 3844 explicit outcomes and every event has a valid first inserted run

description: Content-derived dedupe_key was used as source identity and could change when the same source record content changed
notes: record_id is account_id::external_id while dedupe_key remains only in raw content drift evidence

description: Removal of a source record between snapshots was not detected from prior run membership
notes: Importer compares current membership with the previous completed run and fails on missing source records

description: A first-five-row preview could hide dividend and cash fee normalization errors
notes: Dry-run preview includes a representative row for each event type and displays cash_amount

description: Formal SQLite import did not bind the actual source file table and live table schema to the reviewed contract
notes: Source paths must resolve to the same file and table_schema_sha256 must match the reviewed table

description: CSV source identity depended on a location that changes when the same export is copied or renamed
notes: CSV import requires stable source.identity_key and uses the path only as the current read location

description: Automatic migration of legacy v1 could not reconstruct complete event-run provenance
notes: Legacy and unmarked databases are not mutated and users must create a new v2 sidecar and reimport

description: A mapping could omit record_id and lose stable source record identity
notes: record_id is required for every mapping alongside occurred_at symbol side quantity and price

description: payload_sha256 hashes the complete source_row so technical-only ledger rebuild changes may trigger conservative false conflicts
notes: Require human review for the conflict and never auto-accept source drift

description: All sources currently use full snapshot removal semantics which can misclassify absent rows in monthly incremental CSV exports
notes: Add an explicit snapshot_mode full or append contract before importing incremental exports

description: Historical investor knowledge timestamps are unavailable and all 961 events use the explicit occurred_at fallback
notes: Preserve known_at_fallback=true and add known_at_quality and precision before stronger temporal claims

description: No decision notes are present and historical motives cannot be reconstructed from fills alone
notes: Use note-add only for user-confirmed context and do not infer motives from trades

description: Gate 2 is not started and position_snapshot_items has a nullable market field inside its planned composite primary key
notes: Resolve nullable market key semantics before enabling snapshots in a separately approved Gate 2 plan
